name: home-assistant-dev
description: Codex workflows for developing, deploying, testing, packaging, and releasing Home Assistant projects.

interface.shortDescription: Develop, deploy, test, and release Home Assistant projects.
interface.longDescription: Home Assistant development workflows for custom integrations, dashboards, cards, packages, automations, blueprints, HACS releases, add-ons, live deploy planning, cache invalidation, quality gates, and self-improving runbooks.
defaultPrompt: Plan and validate a Home Assistant integration change.
Generate a backup-first Home Assistant deploy plan.
Prepare a HACS and GitHub release checklist.
